I have access to the IMS.
The farm has a certificate.
It does not have a plan.
Do you have the spreadsheet?
Sao Joao has a certificate. It does not have an action plan.
Boa Vista has an action plan. It does not have IMS access.
Cachoeira has everything. It has all the documents.
Hi Carlos. Does Fazenda Sao Joao have all the required documents?
It has an Impact certificate, but it does not have a corrective action plan.
And does the warehouse have the updated checklist?
Yes, it has the new version of the checklist in the database.
Do you have access to all the producer files?
Yes, I have full access to the IMS. Every producer has a file there.
Good. Which farm does not have IMS access yet?
Fazenda Boa Vista does not have access yet. I help the producer this week.
The farm has an Impact certificate.
It does not have a corrective action plan.
Does the producer have all the documents?
I have six documents to produce each cycle.

Let me tell you what I have at Sucafina. I have access to the IMS, our internal management system. I have six documents to produce each cycle. Every producer has a file in the database, and each farm has a property checklist. Some farms have an Impact certificate, but not every farm has a corrective action plan. I check who has what, and I report it to my manager. That is my job with the documents.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with a quick note about compliance. For the audit, every farm needs the right documents. If a farm doesn't have a corrective action plan, we cannot approve it. If a producer doesn't have IMS access, please help him. Remember: use have and has for the documents, and doesn't have for the ones that are missing. Send me the list of who has what before the deadline. Thank you, and good luck.

First, Carlos opens the database. Every producer has a file. He checks who has the documents. Fazenda Sao Joao has an Impact certificate. But it doesn't have a corrective action plan. Carlos reports who has what to his manager.
